_comment: Single source of truth for cross-environment URLs. Edit ONLY here. fold_db_node/build.rs reads this at compile time and emits Rust constants in OUT_DIR. Shell scripts read it via jq (see scripts/get-env-url.sh). DO NOT hardcode any gateway hostnames anywhere else; scripts/lint-no-hardcoded-urls.sh enforces this in CI. See CLAUDE.md > Endpoint registry.
